div.class: o-ribbon-tab px-3 py-1 cursor-pointer user-select-none fw-bold
topbar-banner irregularity-map d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between border-top

div.title: This tool analyzes spreadsheet formulas for patterns and highlights inconsistencies. Irregularities may indicate potential errors in formula structures, references, or arguments. (Click to turn off)

div.class: ps-3 h-100 flex-fill d-flex justify-content-between rounded-0 alert alert-info ps-0 py-0 my-0
div.span: This tool analyzes formulas for patterns and highlights inconsistencies. Irregularities may indicate potential errors in formula structures, references or arguments.

div.class: o-table-style-picker d-flex flew-row justify-content-between ps-1 border rounded
o-small-composer px-2 py-2 position-relative bg-white border
o-spreadsheet-editor-symbol w-100 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center mx-1
d-flex flex-fill align-items-center bottom-bar-menu border-top border-bottom
o-previous-button px-3 py-1 mx-2 rounded d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
o-whiteboard-full-editor h-100 w-100 d-flex flex-column bg-white border-top

div.style: background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 0.5px 0.5px, #ccc 1px, transparent 0); background-size: 20px 20px; background-position: -0.5px -0.5px; pointer-events: none;

div.class: o-info-icon d-flex flex-row align-items-center text-muted ms-1

Section.t: Add new columns to avoid overwriting cells

div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mb-1 border-bottom pb-1
d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mb-1 border-bottom pb-1
o-sidePanelHeaderActions flex-grow-1 d-flex justify-content-end align-items-center pe-1

t.div: No scenarios defined based on current selection logic.

div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between p-2 mb-1 border rounded o-hoverable

t.div: No active dimension in the pivot

div.class: o-fw-bold py-1 d-flex flex-row justify-content-between align-items-center o-section-title
o-fw-bold pt-4 pb-1 d-flex flex-row justify-content-between align-items-center o-section-title
o-fw-bold pt-4 pb-1 d-flex flex-row justify-content-between align-items-center o-section-title o-pivot-measure
d-flex py-1 px-2 w-100 small text-muted
d-flex flex-row py-1 px-2 w-100 small
py-1 px-2 d-flex flex-column shadow-sm pivot-dimension border rounded
p-2 bg-white border-bottom d-flex sticky-top align-items-baseline pivot-dimension-search bg-white

Section.class: 'align-items-center border-top d-flex flex-row justify-content-between py-1 pivot-defer-update'

div.class: o-notepad-full-editor h-100 w-100 d-flex flex-column bg-white border-top
o-notepad-drawing-overlay position-absolute top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
o-notepad-drawing-editor d-flex flex-column bg-white shadow-lg rounded
d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between px-2 py-1 border-bottom flex-shrink-0
w-100 d-flex align-items-center format-preview px-2 py-1

div.div: Tip: You can use standard Mermaid syntax.

button.class: o-notepad-btn btn-outline-secondary d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center p-1

div.style: pointer-events: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

textarea.style: height: 300px; font-family: monospace; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px; resize: vertical;

Section.div: Select the table range including formulas and input headers, then specify the input cells.
Input cell for values from the top row of the selection.
Input cell for values from the left column of the selection.

t.div: Select cells containing data to see chart suggestions and statistics.

div.class: o-suggestion-thumb-title text-truncate small text-center px-1 mt-1

Section.div: Arguments are available in the args array.

div.class: h-100 w-100 d-flex flex-column bg-view border-top
o-top-10-criterion d-flex flex-row align-items-center gap-2 w-100 mt-2
o-cf-drag-handle h-100 position-absolute d-flex align-items-center o-button-icon
o-cf-preview-icon d-flex justify-content-around align-items-center me-3 bg-white border
o-cf-preview-icon d-flex justify-content-around align-items-center me-3 flex-shrink-0 border
o-cf-iconset o-cf-clickable-icon d-flex flex-row justify-content-between border rounded

Section.t: Show subtotals at the end of series

div.class: o-analysis-line-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center py-2 px-2 border-bottom
o-analysis-line-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center py-2 px-2 border-bottom
text-primary o-add-line-button o-hoverable-button fw-bold d-flex align-items-center gap-1

SelectionInput.disabledRangeTitle.translate: Excluded due to chart limits. Drag to swap with another range.

div.class: o-carousel-preview border-bottom pe-2 position-relative w-100 d-flex align-items-center
o-drag-handle h-100 position-absolute d-flex align-items-center o-button-icon ps-1 flex-shrink-0
o-carousel-preview-icon ms-3 flex-shrink-0 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
o-button-link float-end d-flex align-items-center py-4 pe-4 gap-2

input.t-att-class: { 'o-disabled-ranges' : range.disabled and !range.isFocused, 'o-focused' : range.isFocused, 'o-invalid border-danger position-relative': isInvalid || !range.isValidRange, 'text-decoration-underline': range.xc and range.isFocused and store.mode === 'select-range' }

button.class: border-0 bg-transparent fw-bold o-remove-selection o-button-icon pe-0

div.t-att-class: {'active fw-bold border-bottom border-primary': state.activeTab === tab.id, 'text-muted': state.activeTab !== tab.id}

div.class: o-header-group-main-pane flex-shrink-0 position-relative h-100 w-100 overflow-hidden
div.t-att-class: { 'o-group-rows': hasFrozenPane and props.dimension === 'ROW', 'o-group-columns': hasFrozenPane and props.dimension === 'COL', }

div.class: o-header-group-header position-absolute d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center overflow-hidden
o-group-fold-button user-select-none rounded d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
o-grid-add-rows mt-2 ms-2 w-100 d-flex position-relative align-items-center

t.t-if: highlight.interactive and highlight.range.sheetId === env.model.getters.getActiveSheetId() and props.isFocused !== false

button.class: top-0 end-0 position-absolute o-button primary m-1 shadow

div.class: o-fullscreen-figure o-figure position-relative border rounded shadow
d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center w-100 h-100 text-muted fst-italic
d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center h-100 text-muted bg-white border
div.div: Select a range in the side panel

div.style: width: 8px; height: 8px; top: -4px; left: -4px; cursor: nwse-resize; pointer-events: auto;
width: 8px; height: 8px; top: -4px; right: -4px; cursor: nesw-resize; pointer-events: auto;
width: 8px; height: 8px; bottom: -4px; left: -4px; cursor: nesw-resize; pointer-events: auto;
width: 8px; height: 8px; bottom: -4px; right: -4px; cursor: nwse-resize; pointer-events: auto;

div.class: o-resize-handle position-absolute bg-primary rounded-circle border border-white
div.t-att-style: 'width: 10px; height: 10px; margin-top: -5px; margin-left: -5px; cursor: grab; pointer-events: auto; top: ' + (point.y - origin.top) + 'px; left: ' + (point.x - origin.left) + 'px;'

div.style: position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 12px; background: #0099ff; top: -16px; left: 50%; margin-left: -0.5px; pointer-events: none;
width: 16px; height: 16px; top: -32px; left: 50%; margin-left: -8px; cursor: grab; pointer-events: auto; background: white; border: 2px solid #0099ff; border-radius: 50%; z-index: 10;

FigureComponent.onClickAnchor: (dirX, dirY, ev) => this.startResize(figureUI, dirX, dirY, ev)

div.class: o-carousel-header d-flex align-items-baseline flex-shrink-0 pe-1 pe-auto
o-carousel-empty w-100 flex-fill d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
position-absolute top-0 start-0 pe-none w-100 h-100
o-figure-border pe-auto w-100 h-0 position-absolute pb-2
o-figure-border pe-auto h-100 position-absolute start-0 ps-2
o-figure-border pe-auto w-100 position-absolute bottom-0 pt-2
o-figure-border pe-auto h-100 position-absolute end-0 pe-2

div.t-att-class: { 'bg-white': !props.isDisabled, 'o-topbar-composer-readonly': env.model.getters.isReadonly(), 'o-topbar-composer-active': focus !== 'inactive', 'o-topbar-composer-inactive': focus === 'inactive', 'opacity-50 bg-light pe-none': props.isDisabled, }

span.t-if: props.focus !== 'inactive' and assistantIsAvailable and canBeToggled and assistant.forcedClosed
span.title: Show formula help
span.class: position-absolute translate-middle force-open-assistant fs-4 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

div.style: font-size: 0.8em; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

div.t-if: props.focus !== 'inactive' and assistantIsAvailable and !(canBeToggled and assistant.forcedClosed)

span.class: position-absolute top-0 start-100 translate-middle fs-4 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

div.style: font-size: 0.8em; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

div.class: o-spreadsheet-bottom-bar o-two-columns d-flex flex-fill align-items-center overflow-hidden border-top
o-all-sheets position-relative d-flex h-100 flex-fill overflow-hidden
o-sheet d-flex align-items-center user-select-none text-nowrap border-start border-end px-2
o-sheet d-flex align-items-center user-select-none text-nowrap border-start border-end px-2
o-sheet d-flex align-items-center user-select-none text-nowrap border-start border-end px-2
o-sheet d-flex align-items-center user-select-none text-nowrap border-start border-end px-2
o-bottom-bar-arrows d-flex h-100 me-4 align-items-center ms-3
o-sheet d-flex align-items-center user-select-none text-nowrap border-start border-end
m-0 p-0 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center o-hoverable-button
div.title: Border color
